Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Who is running Sampradaya Sun?

Social · asked by user [] · 2009-11-11 · 3 answers
I only know Rocan, but he must have quite a team running Sampradaya Sun. Is there anyone from Sampradaya Sun here? Would be nice to have some biographical information on editors and contributors of Sampradaya Sun, just to know who is talking.
user [192] · 2009-11-11
..his good wife, her name escapes me, does the web page management ,as far as i know there is no one else.
user [469] · 2009-11-12
I only know Rocan, but he must have quite a team running Sampradaya Sun. Is there anyone from Sampradaya Sun here?

Are you willing to join?
user [23] · 2009-11-12
Rocanas wife, Jahnava dd, has commented here a few times, such as on this page: http://www.pariprashnena.com/discussion/236/
